## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New scanner module / check
- [ ] Reporting / dashboard change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe above)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] New/changed scanner checks are non-destructive (no exploitation, no
      state-changing payloads)
- [ ] No secrets, real target URLs, or credentials committed
- [ ] Existing security controls (CSRF, security headers, password hashing,
      rate-limiting) are unchanged or improved, not weakened
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGES_MADE.md` if behaviour visible to users
      changed

## Testing performed

<!-- e.g. ran against DVWA on localhost:8080, added unit tests for X -->
